transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my sump pump is backing up and it's getting bad! This is Robert Klein at 22 Oak Court. Dispatcher: Okay Robert, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 22 Oak Court right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: sump pump is backing up
